title: How a 30-minute conversation becomes a permanent asset
subtitle: You asked three things: how I *file*, how I *tag* so it stays findable, and the *end part* — turning a raw recording into something I can pull up months later. Here is the whole machine, one stage at a time.
description: You asked three things: how I file, how I tag so it stays findable, and the end part — turning a raw recording into something I can pull up months later. Here is the whole machine, one stage at a time.
audience: Written for Isabella · the real pipeline, nothing hand-wavy
